# apps

List installed apps

## Usage

```bash
agent-device apps [--user-installed] [--all]
```

## Session Requirement

Does not require an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--user-installed`: Apps: list user-installed apps
- `--all`: Apps: list all apps (include system/default apps)

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
